THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GILBERT, VICTOR I. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT HOPE, ANDREW R. WILLIAMS, BRENT ANDREW R.
